Off Calendar Dec-04-2019 Continued To Feb-04-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.'S Motion to Dismiss or Stay Based on Forum Non Conveniens is continued to February 4, 2020, pending coordination decision by the Judicial Council. If appropriate for an earlier hearing, the parties are to inform the court of a new hearing date.
